title: Chamaecrista myrophenges
taxonomy: Chamaecrista myrophenges is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It is a member of the subfamily Caesalpinioideae. Within this subfamily, Chamaecrista myrophenges is classified under the tribe Cassieae. The exact classification of Chamaecrista myrophenges can be further specified as belonging to the genus Chamaecrista and species C. myrophenges.

intro: Chamaecrista myrophora, also known as Pongamia glabra, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is rich in bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, saponins, and alkaloids, which contribute to its reported health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders.
